caption: A woman wearing a striped purple and white shirt and large black over-ear headphones is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a pale green curtain. The on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each scene. As the sequence progresses, she is seen speaking, with her facial expressions shifting from a wide smile to a more neutral, focused expression and back to a smile. Her head moves slightly, and her mouth opens and closes as she talks. The background remains static throughout, consisting of the simple interior setting and the curtain. No other people or objects are visible in the scene, and the camera angle remains a steady close-up shot of the woman from the chest up.
